plugins.name: Chromecast Now Playing
plugins.description: Show what's currently casting on any Chromecast on your network — works with YouTube Music, Spotify, Netflix, Plex and more

plugins.name: Email (IMAP)
plugins.description: Download images from email attachments. Works with Gmail, Outlook, and any IMAP provider. Share photos from Android using Share → Email.

plugins.name: Image Processor
plugins.description: Automatically processes images when uploaded (resize, optimize, generate thumbnails). Demonstrates event system usage.

plugins.name: Immich
plugins.description: Photos from your self-hosted Immich photo library

plugins.name: Lychee
plugins.description: Photos from your self-hosted Lychee photo gallery

plugins.name: Mealie Meal Plan
plugins.description: Display weekly meal plan from Mealie recipe manager

plugins.name: NASA APOD
plugins.description: Astronomy Picture of the Day from NASA — daily curated space images with titles and descriptions

plugins.name: Picsum Photos
plugins.description: Random high-quality images from Picsum Photos (no API key required)

plugins.name: System Monitor
plugins.description: Live system metrics — CPU, memory, disk, temperature and network. Optimised for Raspberry Pi.

plugins.name: Test Plugin
plugins.description: A basic test plugin for plugin installation testing

plugins.name: Test Plugin with Frontend
plugins.description: A test plugin with frontend components for testing frontend installation

plugins.name: Unsplash
plugins.description: Popular photos from Unsplash. Requires an API key from https://unsplash.com/developers

plugins.name: Weather
plugins.description: Display current weather conditions and forecast from OpenWeatherMap

plugins.name: Yr.no Weather
plugins.description: Display current weather conditions and forecast from Yr.no (Norwegian Meteorological Institute)

themes.name: Midnight
themes.description: A deep midnight theme with purple and blue accents
